creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #0)

Turns out when I looked at teh typescript log that lang/gcc6 had not bootstrapped far enough for cc1 to have been built by gcc: It was built by clang 3.8.0.

So I'll be submitting this against the base system (although it likely applies to other clang 3.8.0 contexts).
